name: AWaRe Access
description: Access antibiotics that have a narrow spectrum of activity and a good safety profile in terms of side-effects.

name: AWaRe Watch
description: Watch antibiotics that are broader-spectrum antibiotics and are recommended as first-choice options for patients with more severe clinical presentations or for infections where the causative pathogens are more likely to be resistant to Access antibiotics.

name: AWaRe Reserve
description: Reserve antibiotics that are last-choice antibiotics used to treat multidrug-resistant infections.
